old: Emergency definition: sprinkler leak, active fire alarm, or flood condition.
Non-emergency callers should leave details for next business day.
new: Emergency definition: sprinkler leak, active fire alarm, or flood condition.
Non-emergency callers should leave details for next business day.
Non-emergency calls can be collected after hours and handled next business day.

changes.old: Emergency definition: sprinkler leak, active fire alarm, or flood condition.
Non-emergency callers should leave details for next business day.
changes.new: Non-emergency calls can be collected after hours and handled next business day.

changes.old: If transfer fails after 60 seconds route to backup 602-555-0178.
changes.new: If transfer fails, apologize and confirm dispatch callback within 10 minutes.

old: Integration rule: do not auto-create jobs for alarm false positives.
new: Integration rule: do not auto-create jobs for alarm false positives.
Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade.

changes.old: During office hours (configured days ?-? local timezone), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
changes.new: During office hours (Monday-Friday 08:00 AM-05:00 PM MST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
